name: heimdall-ai
description: Focused Agent Skills for building Heimdall HTML-first ASP.NET Core systems.

interface.longDescription: A focused Agent Skills pack for building, migrating, reviewing, and maintaining Heimdall HTML-first ASP.NET Core systems.
defaultPrompt: Use Heimdall.AI to build a Heimdall HTML-first ASP.NET Core feature.
Use Heimdall.AI to review Heimdall code for correctness and framework fit.
Use Heimdall.AI to migrate an ASP.NET Core interaction to Heimdall.
